title: Get ads
content:
Use this endpoint to get the data of regular ads and Smart Creative ads. To retrieve creative materials for Smart Creative ads, use the [/ad/aco/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739473020978177) endpoint. > **Note**
To return the deleted ads, either specify the value of `STATUS_DELETE` in the `primary_status` field or `AD_STATUS_CAMPAIGN_DELETE`/`AD_STATUS_ADGROUP_DELETE` /`AD_STATUS_DELETE` in the `secondary_status` field. Deleted data is not queried by default. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/ad/get/|/v1.3/ad/get/| |Request parameter name |`create_start_time`
`create_end_time`
`status` | `creation_filter_start_time`
`creation_filter_end_time`
`secondary_status` | |Request parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number
`campaign_ids`: number[]
`adgroup_ids`: number[]
`ad_ids`: number[] |`advertiser_id`: string
`campaign_ids`: string[]
`adgroup_ids`: string[]
`ad_ids`: string[] | |Request parameters deprecated in v1.3|/| `ad_text`
`billing_events`| |New request parameters|/ |`exclude_field_types_in_response`
`destination`
`creative_material_mode`
`optimization_goal`
`campaign_system_origins`
`buying_types`
`modified_after`
`campaign_automation_type`
`ad_ids_v2`| |Response parameter name|`status`
`opt_status`
`profile_image`
`open_url`
`open_url_type`
`vast_moat`
`is_creative_authorized`
`dpa_fallback_type`
`dpa_open_url_type`
`dpa_video_tpl_id` | `secondary_status`
`operation_status`
`profile_image_url`
`deeplink`
`deeplink_type`
`vast_moat_enabled`
`creative_authorized`
`shopping_ads_fallback_type`
`shopping_deeplink_type`
`shopping_ads_video_package_id`| |Response parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number
`campaign_id`: number
`adgroup_id`: number
`ad_id`: number
`tiktok_item_id`: number
`card_id`: number|`advertiser_id`: string
`campaign_id`: string
`adgroup_id`: string
`ad_id`: string
`tiktok_item_id`: string
`card_id`: string| |Response parameters deprecated in v1.3|/|`premium_badge_id` | |New response parameters|/ |`product_specific_type`
`catalog_id`
`item_group_ids`
`product_set_id`
`sku_ids`
`dynamic_format`
`vertical_video_strategy`
`dynamic_destination`
`brand_safety_vast_url`
`viewability_postbid_partner`
`viewability_vast_url`
`utm_params`
`key`
`value`
`showcase_products` (including all the parameters within the object)
`tracking_app_id`
`tracking_offline_event_set_ids`
`music_id`
`carousel_image_index`
`tiktok_page_category`
`phone_region_code`
`phone_region_calling_code`
`phone_number`
`deeplink_format_type`
`campaign_system_origin`
`deeplink_utm_params`
`cpp_url`
`aigc_disclosure_type`
`tracking_message_event_set_id`
`auto_message_id`
`end_card_cta`
`product_display_field_list`
`vehicle_ids`
`auto_disclaimer_types`
`creative_auto_enhancement_strategy_list`
`campaign_automation_type`
` smart_plus_ad_id`
`ad_ids_v2`| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/ad/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |fields |string[]| Fields that you want to get. For the list of fields that you can specify, see the fields under `list` in the response. If not set, all fields are returned by default. | |exclude_field_types_in_response| string[]|The type of fields that you want to remove from the response.
Allowed enum values:
  • `NULL_FIELD`: Fields with null values.
| |filtering |object| Filters on the data. This parameter is an array of filter objects. .

Example: `filtering={"campaign_automation_type":"UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS"}` | #| campaign_automation_type | string | Campaign automation type.

Enum values:
  • `MANUAL`: Manual Campaigns.
  • `SMART_PLUS`: Smart+ Campaigns.
  • `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS`: Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns, a new automated campaign type. To learn more about Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns, see [Upgraded Smart+ Campaign](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1853452461203458).
| #| ad_ids_v2 | string[] | A list of v2 ad IDs.

The types of ID you can filter include:
  • The ID of a Manual Ad.
  • The ID of an Upgraded Smart+ Ad. To create Upgraded Smart+ Ads through API, use [Upgraded Smart+ Ads API](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1843301794874370).

Max size: 100.

Note: When you filter by the IDs of Upgraded Smart+ Ads, the response will only include the following parameters:

  • `advertiser_id`
  • `campaign_id`
  • `campaign_name`
  • `adgroup_id`
  • `adgroup_name`
  • `ad_id_v2`
  • `ad_name`
  • `campaign_automation_type`
| #|campaign_ids |string[]| A list of Campaign IDs.
Max size: 100. | #|campaign_system_origins| string[] | The origins (sources) of the campaigns that the ads belong to.

Enum values:
  • `PROMOTE`: The campaign is a Promote campaign created through the TikTok mobile App.
  • `TT_ADS_PLATFORM`: The campaign is a non-Promote campaign created through the API or in TikTok Ads Manager.
Default value: `["TT_ADS_PLATFORM"]`.

Only the following settings can be retrieved for a Promote ad:
  • `advertiser_id`
  • `campaign_id`
  • `campaign_name`
  • `adgroup_id`
  • `adgroup_name`
  • `ad_id`
  • `ad_name`
  • `create_time`
  • `operation_status`
  • `secondary_status`

To learn more about the availability of and the supported filters for Promote ads, see [Promote campaigns](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1785880454546433). | #|adgroup_ids |string[]| A list of Ad group IDs.
Max size: 100. | #|ad_ids |string[]| A list of Ad IDs.
Max size: 100. | #|primary_status |string| Primary status. For enum values, see [Enumeration -Primary status](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138).| #|secondary_status|string| Ad secondary status. For enum values, see [Enumeration - Ad Status - Secondary Status](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138).

Note:

  • This field is not returned in the sandbox environment because the ad is not actually delivered.
  • See [Supported secondary statuses for a primary status](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1757239620352002) to learn about the valid values you can pass in via `secondary_status` for the primary status you specify.
| #|objective_type |string| Advertising Objective.

For enum values, see [Enumeration - Advertising Objective](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138).

Note: Whether you choose `WEB_CONVERSIONS` or `CONVERSIONS` as the objective filter, we will return data of both `WEB_CONVERSIONS` and `CONVERSIONS`. | #| buying_types | string[] | Filter by buying types.

Enum values:

  • `AUCTION`: Auction ads.
  • `RESERVATION_RF`: Reservation Reach & Frequency ads and TikTok Pulse ads.
  • `RESERVATION_TOP_VIEW`: Reservation TopView ads.

Default value: `["AUCTION", "RESERVATION_RF"]`.

To learn more about the availability of TopView ads in the API, see [TopView](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1804258360285186).

Note: The enum value `RESERVATION_TOP_VIEW` cannot be combined with other values. To filter TopView ads, set this field to `["RESERVATION_TOP_VIEW"]`. | #|optimization_goal|string|Optimization goal. Enum values: [Enumeration - Optimization Goal](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138#item-link-Optimization%20Goal).| #|creative_material_mode|string|The strategy that your creatives will be delivered.
Enum values: `CUSTOM`(custom), `DYNAMIC`(automated), `SMART_CREATIVE`(Smart Creative). | #| destination | string | The destination page type that you want to filter by.

Enum values:

  • `APP`: The download page for the promoted App in Google Play or Apple Store. The `promotion_type` for the corresponding ad group is set as `APP_ANDROID` or `APP_IOS`.
  • `TIKTOK_INSTANT_PAGE`: TikTok Instant Pages, including Custom Page, Instant Form, App Profile Page, and Instant Product Page. The page ID (`page_id`) of a TikTok Instant Page is specified for the ad.
  • `WEBSITE`: Website page. A landing page URL (`landing_page_url`) is specified for the ad.
  • `SOCIAL_MEDIA_APP`: Social media URL. To learn about the ads where the destination can be set as social media URL, see [Create a Lead Generation ad with promotion type as instant messaging apps](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1774482999036930).
  • `PHONE_CALL`: Phone number. To learn about the ads where the destination can be set as phone number, see [Create a Lead Generation ad with promotion type as phone call](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1774482936048641).

If you specify `objective_type` at the same type, see [Filterable destination page type for an advertising objective](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1764306884771842) to learn about the value you can set for this field. | #|creation_filter_start_time |string| Filter ads created later than a specific time, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` (UTC time zone).

Suggestion: To ensure the success and speed of the task, limit the creation time filter to a six-month range.| #|creation_filter_end_time |string| Filter ads created earlier than a specific time, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` (UTC time zone).

Suggestion: To ensure the success and speed of the task, limit the creation time filter to a six-month range.| #| modified_after | string | Filter ads modified after a specific time, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` (UTC time zone).

Suggestion: To ensure the success and speed of the task, limit the modification time filter to a six-month range. | |page |number|Current page number.

Default value: 1. Value range: ≥ 1.| |page_size |number|Page size.

Default value:10. Value range: 1-1,000. | ``` ### Example #### Retrieving ad (asset group) level data for Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/ad/get/?advertiser_id={{advertiser_id}}&filtering={"campaign_automation_type":"UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS","ad_ids_v2":["{{ad_id_v2}}"]}' \ //input the ID of an Upgraded Smart+ Ad (Asset Group) through {{ad_id_v2}} --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` #### Retrieving creative level data for Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/ad/get/?advertiser_id={{advertiser_id}}&filtering={"campaign_automation_type":"UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS","ad_ids":["{{ad_id}}"]}' \ //input the ID of an Upgraded Smart+ Creative through {{ad_id}} --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data |object|Returned data. The returned list is sorted by ad ID (`ad_id`) in reverse order by default.

Note: The data for [Product GMV max ads](https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/about-automated-product-ads?lang=en) and LIVE GMV max ads created from TikTok Shop is excluded from the response. Shopping Ads created via API or TikTok Ads Manager are not affected.| #|list |object[]|A List of ads. The returned fields are generated based on the `fields` specified in the request parameters. If not specified, all fields are returned by default.| ##|advertiser_id |string| Advertiser ID. | ##|campaign_id |string| Campaign ID. | ##|campaign_name|string| Campaign name. | ##| campaign_automation_type | string | Campaign automation type.

Enum values:

  • `MANUAL`: Manual Campaigns.
  • `SMART_PLUS`: Smart+ Campaigns.
  • `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS`: Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns, a new automated campaign type. To learn more about Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns, see [Upgraded Smart+ Campaign](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1853452461203458).
    • When `campaign_automation_type` is `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS`, the returned `ad_id_v2` is the ID of the Upgraded Smart+ Ad.
  • `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS_CREATIVE`: Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns, a new automated campaign type. To learn more about Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns, see [Upgraded Smart+ Campaign](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1853452461203458).
    • When `campaign_automation_type` is `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS_CREATIVE`, the returned `ad_id` is the ID of a creative in the Upgraded Smart+ Ad (Asset Group).
| ##| campaign_system_origin | string | Returned for Promote ads only.
Not returned for non-Promote ads.

The origin (source) of the campaign that the ad belongs to.

Enum values:
  • `PROMOTE`: The campaign is a Promote campaign created through the TikTok mobile App.

Only the following settings can be retrieved for a Promote ad (`campaign_system_origin` is `PROMOTE` at the campaign level):
  • `advertiser_id`
  • `campaign_id`
  • `campaign_name`
  • `adgroup_id`
  • `adgroup_name`
  • `ad_id`
  • `ad_name`
  • `create_time`
  • `operation_status`
  • `secondary_status`
| ##|adgroup_id |string| Ad group ID. | ##|adgroup_name |string| Ad group name. | ##| smart_plus_ad_id | string | Returned only when `campaign_automation_type` is `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS_CREATIVE`.

The ID of the Upgraded Smart+ Ad. | ##|ad_id |string| Ad ID.

  • When `campaign_automation_type` is `MANUAL`, this field represents the ID of a Manual Ad.
  • When `campaign_automation_type` is `SMART_PLUS`, this field represents the ID of an ad within a Smart+ Campaign.
  • When `campaign_automation_type` is `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS_CREATIVE`, this field represents the ID of a creative in the Upgraded Smart+ Ad.
| ##| ad_id_v2 | string | A v2 ad ID.

  • When `campaign_automation_type` is `MANUAL`, this field represents the ID of a Manual Ad.
  • When `campaign_automation_type` is `SMART_PLUS`, this field represents the ID of an ad within a Smart+ Campaign.
  • When `campaign_automation_type` is `UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS`, this field represents the ID of an Upgraded Smart+ Ad.
| ##|ad_name |string| Ad name. | ##|create_time |string| Time at which the ad was created, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` (UTC time zone). | ##|modify_time |string| Time at which the ad was last modified, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS` (UTC time zone). | ##|identity_id|string|Identity ID.
If you are not using Spark Ads, `identity_id` and `identity_type` (`CUSTOMIZED_USER`) can be used for better management of ads information. | ##|identity_type|string| Identity type. Enum values: `CUSTOMIZED_USER`, `AUTH_CODE`, `TT_USER`, `BC_AUTH_TT`.| ##|identity_authorized_bc_id|string|ID of the Business Center that a TikTok Account User in Business Center identity is associated with. Returned when `identity_type` is `BC_AUTH_TT`. | ##|catalog_id|string|The catalog you choose for your ads.

Note: Starting June 30th, 2024, this field will no longer be returned for newly created Shopping Ads where `product_source` is `STORE` at the ad group level because the specified `catalog_id` will be ignored. Existing Shopping Ads where `product_source` is `STORE` will not be affected unless you update them. If you update the existing ads, the existing `catalog_id`, if present for the ad, will no longer be returned.| ##|product_specific_type|string|Different dimensions to choose products.

Enum values:

  • `ALL`: Allow TikTok to dynamically choose from all products.
  • `PRODUCT_SET`: Specify a product set. TikTok will dynamically choose products from this set.
  • `CUSTOMIZED_PRODUCTS`: Specify a customized number of products.
| ##|item_group_ids|string[]|Product SPU IDs.| ##|product_set_id|string|The ID of the product set.| ##|sku_ids|string[]|IDs of the SKUs.| ##|vehicle_ids |string[]|IDs of vehicles.| ##| showcase_products | object[] | The list of Showcase products that you use in your ad.
See [Create Video Shopping Ads with products from Showcase](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1759232259360770) to learn more.| ###| item_group_id | string | SPU ID of the product. | ###| store_id | string | The ID of the store that the product (`item_group_id`) belongs to.
Note that the only supported store type is TikTok Shop. | ###| catalog_id | string | The ID of the catalog that the product (`item_group_id`) belongs to.

Note: Starting June 30th, 2024, this field will no longer be returned for newly created Shopping Ads where `product_source` is `STORE` at the ad group level because the specified `catalog_id` within the `showcase_products` object array will be ignored. Existing Shopping Ads where `product_source` is `STORE` will not be affected unless you update them. If you update the existing ads, the existing `catalog_id` within the `showcase_products` object array, if present for the ad, will no longer be returned.| ##|ad_format|string| The ad format. Enum values: `SINGLE_IMAGE`, `SINGLE_VIDEO`, `LIVE_CONTENT`, `CAROUSEL_ADS` (non-VSA Carousel Ads), `CATALOG_CAROUSEL`(VSA Carousel Ads).| ##|vertical_video_strategy|string|The video type that you use for Product Sales scenarios.

Enum values: `UNSET` (unset), `SINGLE_VIDEO` (single video), `CATALOG_VIDEOS` (catalog video using video templates), `CATALOG_UPLOADED_VIDEOS` (catalog video using uploaded videos), `LIVE_STREAM` (livestream video). | ##|dynamic_format|string|Dynamic format.

Enum values:

  • `UNSET`: Unset.
  • `DYNAMIC_CREATIVE`: smart creative. To display different videos, product cards and destinations to each person based on purchase intent, maximizing conversions.
| ##|video_id |string| The video ID.

If the ad is a Spark Ad created by pulling organic videos from linked Business Account, authorized posts, or authorized TikTok accounts in the Business Center, the value of this field will be null. You can get the the ID of a TikTok post via the `tiktok_item_id` field.

To learn more about Spark Ads, see [Create Spark Ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298). | ##|image_ids|string[]| A list of image IDs| ##|carousel_image_index|integer|The index that specifies the additional images to be used in the VSA Carousel ad.
The number you set via this field represents the position of the product image within the additional image list (`additional_image_urls`) for each catalog product.| ##|end_card_cta |string|Call-to-action for the end card (`image_ids`) of an [Automotive Carousel Ad for Inventory](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1827752507854850#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel) or [Automotive Carousel Ad for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel).

Enum values:
  • `SEARCH_INVENTORY` (Recommended): Search inventory.
  • `LEARN_MORE`: Learn more.
  • `SHOP_NOW`: Shop now.
  • `SIGN_UP`: Sign up.
  • `CONTACT_US`: Contact us.
  • `BOOK_NOW`: Book now.
  • `READ_MORE`: Read more.
  • `VIEW_MORE`: View now.
  • `ORDER_NOW`: Order now.
| ##| auto_disclaimer_types | string[] | The type of disclaimer to show in the [Automotive Carousel Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel).

Enum values:
  • `EMISSION`: Emssion disclaimer.
  • `DISCOUNT`: Discount or offer disclaimer.
| ##|product_display_field_list|string[]|A list of product details to display in your [Automotive Carousel Ad for Inventory](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1827752507854850#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel).

Max size: 2.

Enum values:
  • `DEALER_NAME`: the `dealer_name` field of vehicles.
  • `MAKE`: the `make` field of vehicles.
  • `MODEL`: the `model` field of vehicles.
  • `YEAR`: the `year` field of vehicles.
  • `MILEAGE`: the `mileage` field of vehicles.
  • `PRICE`: the `price` field of vehicles.
  • `SALE_PRICE`: the `sale_price` field of vehicles.
  • `EXTERIOR_COLOR`: the `exterior_color` field of vehicles.
  • `TRIM`: the `trim` field of vehicles.
  • `ADDRESS_CITY`: the `city` field of vehicles.
  • `VEHICLE_STATE`: the `state_of_vehicle` field of vehicles.

The title of each vehicle is displayed automatically. For instance, if you set this field to `["MILEAGE","YEAR"]`, the ad will display the `mileage`, `price` and `title` fields of each vehicle.
To retrieve the product detail fields of your vehicles in an Auto-Inventory catalog and check whether you need to update the details, use [/catalog/product/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1740564136678402).| ##| music_id | string | The ID of the piece of music that is used in the TikTok Carousel Ad. | ##|tiktok_item_id |string| The ID of the TikTok post that is used as Spark Ad.

To learn more about Spark Ads, see [Create Spark Ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298).

Note: This field is returned for any of the following types of Spark Ads:

  • Spark Ads created through [Spark Ads Pull](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298#item-link-Spark%20Ads%20Pull).
  • Spark Ads created through [Spark Ads Push](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298#item-link-Spark%20Ads%20Push) and have passed ad reviews.
| ##| promotional_music_disabled | boolean | Whether to disable the promotional use of the music in the Spark Ad post. The default value is `true`. If you want to allow dueting and stitching for the Spark Ad post, you need to set this field to `false`. This field is only valid for Spark Ad posts. | ##|item_duet_status | string | Whether to enable dueting for the Spark Ad post. This field is valid only when `promotional_music_disabled` is set to `false`. Enum values: `ENABLE`, `DISABLE`. This field is only valid for Spark Ad posts.| ##| item_stitch_status | string | Whether to enable stitching for the Spark Ad post. This field is valid only when `promotional_music_disabled` is set to `false`. Enum values: `ENABLE`, `DISABLE`. This field is only valid for Spark Ad posts.| ##| dark_post_status | string | Indicates whether the ad is a Spark Ads dark post. Enum value: `ON`, `OFF`. | ##| branded_content_disabled | boolean | Default is `false`. If `branded_content_disabled` is `true`, you cannot modify `dark_post_status`. | ##|shopping_ads_video_package_id|string| Catalog video template ID.
Returned when the corresponding campaign `objective_type` is `PRODUCT_SALES`.| ##|ad_text |string| The ad text. It is shown to your audience as part of your ad creative, to deliver the message you intend to communicate to them. | ##|ad_texts |string[]| A list of ad texts. | ##|call_to_action |string| For call-to-action text, see [Enumeration - Call-to-action](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138)| ##|call_to_action_id |string|The ID of the CTA portfolio that you want to use in your ads. A CTA portfolio is a group of auto-optimized CTAs. If both this field and `call_to_action` are specified, `call_to_action` will be ignored. For details about dynamic CTAs, see [CTA Recommendations - Dynamic CTAs](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1740307296329730).| ##|card_id|string| Creative portfolio ID. | ##|landing_page_url |string|Landing page URL.| ##|utm_params |object[]| Returned only in any of the following scenarios:
  • Video Shopping Ads (VSA) for Catalog scenarios:
    • At the campaign level:
      • `objective_type` is set to `PRODUCT_SALES`
    • At the ad group level:
      • `shopping_ads_type` is set to `VIDEO` (Video Shopping Ads)
      • `product_source` is set to `CATALOG`
      • `promotion_type` is set to `WEBSITE`, `APP_ANDROID`, or `APP_IOS`
  • Automotive Ads for Inventory (AIA) or [Automotive Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994) scenarios:
    • At the campaign level:
      • `objective_type` is set to `LEAD_GENERATION`
      • `catalog_enabled` is set to `true`
    • At the ad group level:
      • `promotion_target_type` is set to `EXTERNAL_WEBSITE`
  • Other scenarios:
    • At the campaign level:
      • `objective_type` is set to `REACH`, `TRAFFIC`, `VIDEO_VIEWS`, `LEAD_GENERATION` (with `catalog_enabled` as `false`), `ENGAGEMENT`, `APP_PROMOTION` (with `app_promotion_type` as `APP_PREREGISTRATION`), `WEB_CONVERSIONS`, or `RF_REACH`.

A list of URL parameters.| ###|key |string| The URL parameter. | ###|value |string|The value of the URL parameter. | ##|page_id |number| Page ID. | ##| cpp_url | string | The Custom Product Page (CPP) URL.
CPPs are product pages with customized screenshots, promotional text, and app previews that can be used to highlight specific content or features of the promoted app, or reach specific audiences. | ##|tiktok_page_category|string|The category of the TikTok pages that you want to promote.

Enum values:
  • `PROFILE_PAGE`: TikTok account profile page.
  • `OTHER_TIKTOK_PAGE`: Other TikTok pages, including Playlist Page, Hashtag Page, Music Page and Branded Effect Page.
  • `TIKTOK_INSTANT_PAGE`: Custom TikTok Instant Page.
| ##| phone_region_code | string | Returned only when `promotion_type` is set to `LEAD_GEN_CLICK_TO_CALL` at the ad group level.

The region code for the phone number that the audience can click on the ad to call.

To learn about how to create a Lead Generation ad with promotion type as phone call, refer to [here](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1774482936048641).

Note: Creating a Lead Generation ad with promotion type as phone call is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##| phone_region_calling_code | string | Returned only when `promotion_type` is set to `LEAD_GEN_CLICK_TO_CALL` at the ad group level.

The phone number that the audience can click on the ad to call.

Note: Creating a Lead Generation ad with promotion type as phone call is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##| phone_number | string | Returned only when `promotion_type` is set to `LEAD_GEN_CLICK_TO_CALL` at the ad group level.

The phone number that the audience can click on the ad to call.

Note: Creating a Lead Generation ad with promotion type as phone call is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##| creative_auto_enhancement_strategy_list | string[] | The list of automatic enhancement strategies to apply to your ads.
The enhancements you specified will be automatically applied in real-time as your campaign is delivered.

Enum values:

  • `VIDEO_QUALITY`: Video quality. Improve overall visual quality with increased resolution and clarity.
  • `MUSIC_REFRESH`: Music refresh. Stay on-trend by swapping in music currently popular on TikTok.
  • `IMAGE_QUALITY`: Image quality. Improve overall visual quality with increased resolution and clarity.
  • `IMAGE_RESIZE`: Resize. Resize your image to take advantage of full-screen capabilities.
| ##|deeplink |string| The specific location where you want your audience to go if they have your app installed. | ##|deeplink_type |string| The deeplink type. Allowed values differs based on campaign objectives.

Enum values:
  • `NORMAL`: non-deferred deeplink.
  • `DEFERRED_DEEPLINK`: deferred deeplink.
| ##| deeplink_format_type | string | The format type of the deeplink.

Enum values:
  • `UNIVERSAL_OR_APP_LINK`: Apple’s universal link or Android App Link starting with `http://` or `https://`.
  • `SCHEME_LINK`: Custom URL scheme, in the format of `scheme://resource`. For instance, a Custom URL scheme of WhatsApp should follow the format `whatsapp://resource`.
  • `NONE`: Not a deeplink.
| ##|shopping_ads_deeplink_type|string| The source of the deeplink to be used in the Shopping Ads.

Enum values:
  • `NONE`: No deeplink.
  • `CUSTOM`: Custom deeplink. Use the deeplink you provided in the ad.
  • `SHOPPING_ADS`: Product deeplink. Use the deeplink you've provided for each product in the catalog.
| ##| deeplink_utm_params| object[] | A list of deeplink URL parameters.

Note: Deeplink URL parameters are currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ###| key | string | The deeplink URL parameter. | ###| value | string | The value of the deeplink URL parameter. | ##|shopping_ads_fallback_type |string| In the Shopping Ads retargeting scenario, the fallback website type when the deeplink fails to be triggered.

Enum values:

  • `DEFAULT`: Unset.
  • `CUSTOM`: Custom link. Fall back to the web page link you provide.
  • `SHOPPING_ADS`: Product link. Fall back to the web page link you've provided for each product in the catalog.
| ##|fallback_type |string| Fallback Type. If the audience do not have the app installed, you can have them fall back to install the app, or to view a specific web page.

Enum values:
  • `APP_INSTALL`: the App Store or Google Play page for the promoted App that is specified through the `app_id` field at the ad group level.
  • `WEBSITE`: the promoted web page that is specified through `landing_page_url`.
  • `UNSET`: Unset.
| ##|dynamic_destination|string|Dynamic destination strategy.
Enum values:
  • `DLP`: Dynamic Landing Page. Displaying different destinations including a custom website or Instant Product Page to each person based on their profile, behavior, and intent to maximize ad conversion.
  • `UNSET`: Unset.
| ##| auto_message_id | string | The ID of the automatic message to use in a TikTok Direct Messaging Ad.

Currently, the only supported automatic message type is welcome message. | ##|aigc_disclosure_type | string | Whether to turn on the AIGC (Artificial Intelligence Generated Content) self-disclosure toggle to indicate the ad contains AI-generated content. After the toggle is turned on, your ad will carry an "Advertiser labeled as Al-generated" label when viewed in full.

Enum values:
  • `SELF_DISCLOSURE`: To turn on the toggle to declare that the ad contains AI-generated content.
  • `NOT_DECLARED`: To not declare that the ad contains AI-generated content.
| ##| disclaimer_type | string | Type of disclaimer in the ad. Enum values: `TEXT_LINK`(clickable disclaimers), `TEXT_ONLY`(text-only disclaimers).

Note: Disclaimers are currently an allowlist-only feature for advertisers not registered in Canada and America using auction ad objectives, and for all advertisers using Reach & Frequency ad objectives. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##| disclaimer_text | object | The text-only disclaimer in the ad. | ###| text | string | The disclaimer text. | ##| disclaimer_clickable_texts | object[] | The clickable disclaimer or clickable disclaimers in the ad. | ###| text | string | The disclaimer text. | ###| url | string | The URL for the clickable disclaimer. When users tap each text, they will be redirected to the URL and see more disclaimer details. | ##|tracking_pixel_id|number|The pixel ID that is tracked. You can use this field to track offsite events that do not happen on the TikTok instant page. | ##|tracking_app_id | string| The ID of the application that is tracked. | ##| tracking_offline_event_set_ids |string[]|A list of Offline Event set IDs that are tracked.
See [here](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1758051319816193) to learn more about how to create and manage Offline Event sets.| ##| tracking_message_event_set_id | string | The ID of the message event set that is measured in the Instant Messaging Ad. | ##|vast_moat_enabled |boolean| Whether Moat Viewability Verification is enabled for the ad. TikTok has partnered with Moat to launch viewability measurement for Brand Auction and Reach & Frequency In-feed ads purchased on TikTok for Business.

Note: If you want to enable Moat Viewability Measurement for the ad, we recommend setting `viewability_postbid_partner` to `MOAT` instead of using `vast_moat_enabled`.| ##| viewability_postbid_partner | string | Post-bid third-party viewability measurement partner. Enum values: `UNSET`, `MOAT`, `DOUBLE_VERIFY`, `IAS`, `ZEFR`.

Note: Post-bid third-party viewability measurement is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##| viewability_vast_url | string | The wrapped VAST URL used by the post-bid third-party partner to measure viewability. The value is null when `viewability_postbid_partner` is not `IAS`.

Note: Post-bid third-party viewability measurement is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##|brand_safety_postbid_partner |string| Post-bid third-party brand safety measurement partner. Enum values: `UNSET`，`DOUBLE_VERIFY`, `IAS`, `ZEFR`.

Note: Post-bid third-party brand safety measurement is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.| ##| brand_safety_vast_url | string | The wrapped VAST URL used by the post-bid third-party partner to measure brand safety. The value is null when `brand_safety_postbid_partner` is not `IAS`.

Note: Post-bid third-party brand safety measurement is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. | ##|impression_tracking_url |string|Default Impression Tracking URL.| ##|click_tracking_url |string|Click Tracking URL.| ##|playable_url |string| Playable material URL. | ##|operation_status |string|Operation status.

Enum values:

  • `ENABLE` : The ad is enabled (in 'ON' status).
  • `DISABLE`: The ad is disabled (in 'OFF' status).
  • `FROZEN`: The ad is terminated and cannot be enabled.
| ##|secondary_status |string| Ad status (Secondary status). For enum values, see [Enumeration-Ad Status - Secondary Status](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138).

Note: This field is not returned in the sandbox environment because the ad is not actually delivered.| ##|creative_type |string| Creative type for Live Shopping Ads, Product Shopping Ads, App Pre-Registration, Automotive Ads for Inventory, or Automotive Ads for Models scenarios. Enum values:

  • `SHOP_PDP`: Shop ads with a single product link.
  • `SHOP_PLP`: Shop ads with 6-50 product links.
  • `SHORT_VIDEO_LIVE`: Short videos that direct traffic to live shopping room.
  • `DIRECT_LIVE`: Live shopping room. Each campaign can have only one live shopping room.
  • `PSA`: The product visuals will be used as ad creative.
  • `CUSTOM_INSTANT_PAGE`: Customized TikTok Instant Page.
    Returned only when `app_promotion_type` is `APP_PREREGISTRATION` at the campaign level and `promotion_website_type` is set to `TIKTOK_NATIVE_PAGE` at the ad group level.
  • `AUTO_INVENTORY_INSTANT_PAGE`：A video or carousel with an auto-generated Instant Product Page showcasing the inventory of the Auto-Inventory catalog in Automotive Ads for Inventory or the models of the Auto-Model Catalog in the Automotive Ads for Models.
    Returned only when `objective_type` is `LEAD_GENERATION` and `catalog_enabled` is set to `true` at the campaign level.
| ##|app_name |string|App name that is displayed in the ad.| ##|display_name |string|The display name of landing page or pure exposure ad.| ##|avatar_icon_web_uri|string|ID of the avatar image. | ##|profile_image_url |string|Avatar URL.| ##|creative_authorized |boolean| Whether you grant displaying some of your ads in our TikTok For Business Creative Center. Only valid for non-US advertisers, the default value is `false`.

Note: `creative_authorized` can only be used for video ads. | ##|is_aco |boolean| Whether the ad is an automated ad or Smart Creative ad. Set to `True` for an automated ad or Smart Creative ad.| ##|is_new_structure|boolean|Whether the campaign is a new structure (for the same campaign, the structure of campaign, adgroups and ads are the same)| ##|optimization_event|string|Conversion event for the ad group. See [Conversion events](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739361474981889) for more.| #|page_info |object | Pagination information. | ##|page |number | Current page number. | ##|page_size |number | Paging size. | ##|total_number |number | Total number of results. | ##|total_page |number |Total pages of results. | ``` ### Example #### Retrieving ad (asset group) level data for Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "campaign_id": "{{campaign_id}}", "adgroup_id": "{{adgroup_id}}", "campaign_name": "{{campaign_name}}", //ad name "ad_name": "{{ad_name}}", //ad ID "ad_id_v2": "{{ad_id_v2}}", "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "campaign_automation_type": "UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS", "adgroup_name": "{{adgroup_name}}" } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 10, "total_page": 1, "total_number": 1 } } } (/code) ``` #### Retrieving creative level data for Upgraded Smart+ Campaigns ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "video_id": "{{video_id}}", "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "campaign_name": "{{campaign_name}}", "adgroup_name": "{{adgroup_name}}", "campaign_id": "{{campaign_id}}", "adgroup_id": "{{adgroup_id}}", "modify_time": "{{modify_time}}", "identity_id": "{{identity_id}}", //creative ID "ad_id": "{{ad_id}}", "secondary_status": "AD_STATUS_CAMPAIGN_DISABLE", "identity_type": "CUSTOMIZED_USER", "campaign_automation_type": "UPGRADED_SMART_PLUS_CREATIVE", "ad_text": "", //ad ID "smart_plus_ad_id": "{{smart_plus_ad_id}}", "operation_status": "ENABLE", //creative name "ad_name": "{{ad_name}}", "create_time": "{{create_time}}", "image_ids": [ "{{image_id}}" ] } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 10, "total_page": 1, "total_number": 1 } } } (/code) ```
